name: Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the potatoes and place them in a colander. Rinse under cold water to remove excess starch, then drain well.
2. Grate the onion and place it in a separate colander. Press with the back of a wooden spoon to remove excess moisture.
3. Combine the grated potatoes and onion in a large bowl.
4. Beat the eggs into the mixture.
5. Stir in the flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper.
6. Heat about 1/8 inch of oil in a large skillet.
7. Drop approximately 2 tablespoons of batter into the hot oil, flattening each pancake with the back of a wooden spoon for a crisper texture.
8. Cook until browned on both sides, then drain on paper towels.
9. Keep cooked pancakes warm in an oven set to 100 degrees Fahrenheit.
